entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum bicolor (L.) Moench, an important crop grown on Vertisols in north eastern Nigeria

entities.name: VERTISOL
entities.description: A type of soil characterized by high clay content, found in north eastern Nigeria

entities.name: NORTH EASTERN NIGERIA
entities.description: The geographical region where the field trials were conducted

entities.name: DRY SEASON
entities.description: The seasonal period during which sorghum is grown

entities.name: RESIDUAL MOISTURE
entities.description: Moisture remaining in the soil after the rainy season

entities.name: TERMINAL DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Water stress occurring at the end of the crop growth cycle

entities.name: RESOURCE USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which the crop utilizes available resources

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The total agricultural output of the crop

entities.name: PLANT POPULATION DENSITY
entities.description: The number of plants per unit area, varied from 2.0 to 12.5 plants m-2

entities.name: WATER USE
entities.description: The efficiency or amount of water utilized by the plant

entities.name: RADIATION USE
entities.description: The efficiency or amount of solar radiation utilized by the plant

entities.name: BULWALANA
entities.description: A locally adapted Nigerian sorghum variety

entities.name: BOURGOURI-28
entities.description: A sorghum variety selected from Cameroun

entities.name: CAMEROUN
entities.description: The country of origin for the Bourgouri-28 variety

entities.name: LIGHT INTERCEPTION
entities.description: The ability of the plant canopy to capture light

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The weight of the grain produced per unit area

entities.name: LEAF AREA INDEX
entities.description: A measure of the leaf area per unit ground surface area

entities.name: RADIATION INTERCEPTION
entities.description: The amount of solar radiation captured by the crop canopy

entities.name: STEM BORER
entities.description: A pest that causes stem tunnelling and holes in sorghum

entities.name: STEM BORER INCIDENCE
entities.description: The frequency or occurrence of stem borer infestation

entities.name: COVERED KERNEL SMUT
entities.description: A disease caused by Sporisorium sorghi

entities.name: EARLY MATURING
entities.description: The characteristic of cultivars that reach maturity quickly
